src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Remove the insecure global SSL verification disabling logic and its associated imports.
Add a utility method to mask sensitive OAuth tokens in debug logs to prevent credential leakage.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: private static String maskToken(String token) { ... return token.substring(0, 8) + "***"; }

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Apply token masking to the 'New Token Just Created' debug log statement.
Apply token masking to the 'Using Cached Token' debug log statement.
Apply token masking to the 'Sent New Token' debug log statement.
Cache the HttpAdapterServletResponse instance to avoid creating a new wrapper on every call to res().
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: Added private HttpAdapterServletResponse cachedResponse field and lazy initialization in res() method.

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Initialize a B3 propagation extractor to parse distributed tracing context from incoming HTTP headers.
Extract server span creation logic into a dedicated method that handles B3 context extraction and span kind assignment.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: private SpanWrapper createServerSpan(..., HttpServletRequest req, String spanName) { ... tracer.nextSpan(extracted).name(spanName).kind(Span.Kind.SERVER); ... }

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Enrich the root span with standard HTTP semantic tags such as method, URL, path, query, client IP, and user agent.
Tag the root span with the final HTTP status code in the finally block to ensure observability of response outcomes.
Add the x-trace-id header to the HTTP response to facilitate client-side correlation of traces.
Remove eager body copying from constructor to implement lazy loading for better performance.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: Removed call to copyBody() in constructor and deleted the method.

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Increase the byte buffer size for reading the request body to improve I/O efficiency.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: Changed buffer size from 1024 to 8192 bytes in getBodyAsBytes().

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Cache the read body bytes in the instance field to prevent re-reading the input stream on subsequent calls.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: Assigned byteArrayOutputStream.toByteArray() to this.body before returning.

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Move SSL context and trust manager initialization to static final fields to avoid per-request cryptographic overhead.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: private static final SSLContext SHARED_SSL_CONTEXT; ... static { ... }

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Introduce a shared ConnectionPool instance configured via adapter.yaml to reuse HTTP connections across clients.
Mask Authorization header values in debug logs to prevent leaking sensitive tokens.
Wrap header dumping loops in isDebugEnabled checks to avoid string concatenation overhead when logging is disabled.
Configure GroovyScriptEngine to recompile source files with a minimum interval to balance freshness and performance.
Replace shared mutable Binding with a local ProtectedBinding instance to resolve thread-safety race conditions in Groovy execution.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: ProtectedBinding localBindings = new ProtectedBinding(); ... gse.run(runningScript, localBindings);

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Inject B3 tracing headers into upstream HTTP requests to enable distributed tracing across services.
Add semantic tags for status code, content type, and content length to upstream response spans.
Add http.path tag to the root request span for better observability.
Wrap debug logging statements in an isDebugEnabled check to avoid unnecessary string concatenation and object creation when logging is disabled.
Replace string concatenation in log messages with parameterized placeholders to improve performance and readability.
Remove verbose and potentially sensitive raw body content logging to reduce noise and improve security.
Restructure tracing spans to separate setup, processing, and decision logic into distinct child spans for better observability granularity.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: Created 'response-setup', 'response-pipe-decision', 'response-headers-copy', and 'response-send-to-client' spans instead of a single flat structure.

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Enrich tracing spans with specific metadata tags to improve debugging and monitoring capabilities.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: Added tags like 'synth', 'return-pipe', 'has-processors', 'status-code', and 'upstream-headers-count' to respective spans.

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Remove performance-heavy per-header tagging from the tracing span to reduce overhead in the hot path.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: Removed the loop that added 'header-' tags for every upstream header, replacing it with a single 'upstream-headers-count' tag.

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Disable verbose debug logging for upstream headers to improve performance in production environments.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: Commented out the logger.debug call inside the header copying loop.

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Update code comments to reflect the new phased structure of the response handling logic.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: Replaced Portuguese comments with structured phase markers like '--- Fase 1: Setup do client response ---'.

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Replace ConcurrentSkipListMap with ConcurrentHashMap for responseProcessors to improve performance by removing unnecessary ordering overhead.
Replace ConcurrentSkipListMap with ConcurrentHashMap for objects map to improve performance by removing unnecessary ordering overhead.
Replace new String() with empty string literal to avoid unnecessary object allocation.
Change default value of returnPipe from false to true to enable streaming response by default for performance.
Increase the initial capacity of the ByteArrayOutputStream to reduce resizing overhead during response body buffering.
Catch Throwable instead of IOException to handle all potential startup failures.
Configure custom Jetty QueuedThreadPool with configurable min/max threads and idle timeout.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: QueuedThreadPool threadPool = new QueuedThreadPool(...); javalinConfig.jetty.threadPool = threadPool;
